_meta.description: Color system — tints/shades per mood primary, background textures, overlay options, gradient definitions
_meta.usage: Koristiti za hover states, disabled, tinted backgrounds, gradient implementacije i CSS texture patterns.

tint_shade_system.note: Za svaki mood, primary boja ima 9 nijansa (50-900). Koristiti u CSS varijablama.

background_textures.note: CSS-only teksture. Bez eksternih slika. Dodati na :root ili specifičnu sekciju.

noise.css: background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); background-blend-mode: overlay;

dot-grid.note: Za full-page pozadinu ili hero sekciju

line-grid.css_dark: background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(148,163,184,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(148,163,184,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px;
line-grid.css_neon: background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0,245,255,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,245,255,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px;
line-grid.css_brutal: background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(10,10,10,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(10,10,10,0.06) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px;

diagonal-lines.css: background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, transparent, transparent 10px, rgba(10,10,10,0.04) 10px, rgba(10,10,10,0.04) 11px);
diagonal-lines.note: Za surface/card pozadinu, ne za cijelu stranicu

organic-blobs.implementation: SVG blobs kao position: absolute, pointer-events: none, z-index: -1
organic-blobs.blob1_css_organic: .blob-1 { position: absolute; width: 600px; height: 600px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(74,124,89,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%); border-radius: 60% 40% 70% 30% / 50% 60% 40% 50%; top: -200px; right: -100px; animation: blob-float 20s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes blob-float { 0%,100% { transform: translate(0,0) rotate(0deg); } 33% { transform: translate(30px,-30px) rotate(60deg); } 66% { transform: translate(-20px,20px) rotate(-30deg); } }
organic-blobs.blob1_css_pastel: .blob-1 { position: absolute; width: 500px; height: 500px; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(192,132,252,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%); border-radius: 40% 60% 30% 70% / 60% 40% 70% 30%; top: -150px; right: -150px; animation: blob-float 25s ease-in-out infinite; }

scanlines.css: background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.07) 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.07) 4px);
scanlines.note: Dodati kao ::after overlay na hero sekciju, pointer-events: none

gradients.darktech_hero: radial-gradient(ellipse at top, rgba(59,130,246,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(to bottom, #0F172A, #1E293B)

semantic_colors.note: Standardni semantički tokeni — dodati u :root za svaki sajt
